get.description: Returns all users belonging to the caller's organisation. Requires admin role.

post.description: Creates a new user in the caller's organisation. The password is bcrypt-hashed before storage. Role defaults to 'user' if not specified or invalid. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns a single user record. The user must belong to the caller's organisation. Requires admin role.

put.description: Updates name, email, and role for the given user. If password is provided, it is re-hashed and stored. The user must belong to the caller's organisation. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the given user. The user must belong to the caller's organisation. Self-deletion is not allowed. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns the list of EEG UUIDs that the user has been explicitly assigned to. Admins have implicit access to all EEGs. Requires admin role.
get.summary: Get EEG assignments for a user

put.description: Replaces the full set of EEG assignments for the user. Pass an empty array to remove all assignments. Requires admin role.
put.summary: Set EEG assignments for a user

parameters.description: Array of EEG UUIDs to assign
parameters.name: body

post.description: Validates email/password credentials and returns a signed JWT together with basic user information.

get.description: Returns the last-known status of the EDA worker (transport mode, last poll time, last error). Returns an empty status object if the worker has never run.
Returns all EEGs accessible to the authenticated user. Admins see all EEGs in the organization; other roles see only their assigned EEGs.

post.description: Creates a new Energiegemeinschaft (EEG) within the authenticated user's organization. Fields name and netzbetreiber are required.

get.description: Returns a single EEG by its UUID, scoped to the authenticated user's organization.

put.description: Updates settings of an existing EEG. Only fields provided in the body are applied; name and netzbetreiber are kept if omitted.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an EEG and all its associated data. This action is irreversible.

get.description: Exports invoices for the given date range as an XLSX Buchungsjournal or a DATEV EXTF Buchungsstapel CSV. Cancelled invoices are excluded. Both from and to are required.

Exports a complete JSON snapshot of all EEG data including members, meter points, tariff schedules, billing runs, invoices, participations, and energy readings. The file is returned as a downloadable attachment.

post.description: Startet einen neuen Abrechnungslauf für den angegebenen Zeitraum. Gibt 409 zurück, wenn sich der Zeitraum mit einem bestehenden Lauf überschneidet (außer force=true).

200.description: Ergebnis mit billing_run, invoices_created, invoices, preview

get.description: Gibt alle Abrechnungsläufe einer EEG zurück.

delete.description: Löscht einen Abrechnungslauf im Status 'draft' endgültig, inklusive aller zugehörigen Rechnungen. Nur Entwürfe können gelöscht werden.

400.description: Ungültige ID oder Lauf nicht im Draft-Status

post.description: Storniert einen finalisierten Abrechnungslauf: erzeugt Stornorechnungs-PDFs für alle nicht bezahlten Rechnungen und setzt den Lauf sowie die Rechnungen auf 'cancelled'.

get.description: Gibt eine XLSX-Datei mit allen Rechnungsdaten des Abrechnungslaufs zurück (Rechnungsnummer, Mitglied, Zeitraum, kWh, Betrag, Status).

post.description: Setzt einen Abrechnungslauf im Status 'draft' auf 'finalized'. Finalisierte Läufe sind unveränderlich.

400.description: Ungültige ID oder Lauf bereits finalisiert

get.description: Gibt alle Rechnungen zurück, die einem bestimmten Abrechnungslauf zugeordnet sind.

post.description: Versendet alle Rechnungen eines Abrechnungslaufs per E-Mail (Route mit runID) oder alle offenen Rechnungen einer EEG (Legacy-Route ohne runID).

get.description: Erzeugt ein ZIP-Archiv aller Rechnungs-PDFs eines Abrechnungslaufs und streamt es als Download.

post.description: Creates an EC_EINZEL_ANM process to register a single meter point with the energy community (Netzbetreiber). Queues an outbound XML job for the EDA worker.

get.description: Returns EDA messages that failed processing and were moved to the dead-letter (eda_errors) table for manual review.

parameters.description: Maximum number of entries to return (default 50, max 500)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns EDA protocol messages (inbound and outbound) for the given EEG, ordered by received/sent time descending. The result is limited to 100 entries by default; use the limit and offset query parameters for pagination (max 500 per page).
get.summary: List EDA messages for an EEG

parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default 100, max 500)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Number of messages to skip for pagination (default 0)
parameters.name: offset

get.description: Returns the raw MaKo XML payload for the specified EDA message as a downloadable attachment (application/xml). The message must belong to the given EEG.
get.summary: Download raw XML for an EDA message

post.description: Sends an ANFORDERUNG_ECP (CPRequest 01.12) to the Netzbetreiber to request the current list of registered meter points (Zählpunktliste) for the energy community. Queues an outbound XML job for the EDA worker.
Proxies a poll-now trigger to the EDA worker HTTP server. Requires EDA_WORKER_URL to be configured. Returns 503 if the worker is not configured or unreachable.

503.description: EDA worker not configured or unreachable

get.description: Returns all EDA processes (Anmeldung, Abmeldung, Teilnahmefaktor) for an EEG.

post.description: Creates an EC_PRTFACT_CHG process to change the participation factor for a meter point. Restricted to 09:00–17:00 Vienna time; effective from the next calendar day. Only one change per Zählpunkt per day is allowed.
Sends a CMRevoke 01.10 (AUFHEBUNG_CCMS) to the Netzbetreiber to revoke a previously granted customer consent. Used when a member leaves the EEG.
Sends an EC_REQ_PT request for historical Zählpunktdaten (meter readings) over a given date range. Queues an outbound XML job for the EDA worker.

get.description: Returns raw energy readings aggregated per member for a date range. Used for CSV/XLSX export of member energy data. Both from and to are required.

Returns EEG-wide aggregated energy readings (consumption, generation, Restbedarf, Resteinspeisung) bucketed by the requested granularity. Date boundaries are interpreted in Vienna local time (Europe/Vienna).

parameters.description: Time bucket size: year, month, day, 15min (default: month)
parameters.name: granularity

get.description: Generates and downloads an XLSX workbook with two sheets: Mitglieder (members) and Zählpunkte (meter points) for the given EEG.
Returns meter points with gap_alert_sent_at set (i.e. an alert was sent and data is still missing).
get.summary: List current gap alerts for an EEG

post.description: Importiert Energiemesswerte aus einer Energiedaten-XLSX. Mit ?mode=overwrite (Standard) werden bestehende Werte überschrieben; mit ?mode=skip werden Konflikte übersprungen. Messwerte ab dem EDA-Übergangsdatum werden automatisch verworfen.

400.description: Ungültige EEG ID, fehlendes Dateifeld oder Parse-Fehler

post.description: Parst eine Energiedaten-XLSX und vergleicht sie mit den bestehenden DB-Daten. Gibt Statistiken zu neuen, identischen und konfliktierenden Zeilen zurück, ohne etwas zu speichern.

200.description: Vorschau-Statistiken (total_rows, new_rows, identical_rows, conflict_rows, skipped_meters, skipped_transition)

400.description: Ungültige EEG ID, fehlendes Dateifeld oder Parse-Fehler

post.description: Importiert Mitglieder und Zählpunkte aus einer XLSX-Datei (multipart/form-data, Feld "file"). Vorhandene Datensätze werden per Upsert aktualisiert.

400.description: Ungültige EEG ID, fehlendes Dateifeld oder Parse-Fehler

get.description: Gibt alle Rechnungen einer EEG zurück.
Liefert das PDF einer Rechnung als Binärdatei. Mit ?regenerate=true wird das PDF neu generiert.

parameters.description: PDF neu generieren statt aus Datei lesen
parameters.name: regenerate

post.description: Versendet eine einzelne Rechnung erneut per E-Mail an die hinterlegte Mitglieds-E-Mail-Adresse.

400.description: Ungültige ID, kein PDF oder keine E-Mail-Adresse

404.description: Rechnung, Mitglied oder EEG nicht gefunden

patch.description: Setzt oder löscht eine SEPA-Rücklastschrift für eine Rechnung. Wenn alle Felder leer sind, wird die Rücklastschrift gelöscht.
Setzt den Status einer Rechnung. Gültige Werte: draft, pending, sent, paid, cancelled.

get.description: Serves the stored logo image for an EEG. Returns image/jpeg or image/png depending on the stored file extension.

post.description: Accepts a JPEG or PNG image (max 4 MB) via multipart/form-data field "logo", stores it on disk and updates the EEG logo.

parameters.description: Logo image (JPEG or PNG, max 4 MB)
parameters.name: logo

get.description: Returns all members belonging to the given EEG, each with their assigned meter points. Supports optional full-text search (q) and status filter.

parameters.description: Full-text search string (name, email, member number)
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Filter by member status (ACTIVE or INACTIVE)
parameters.name: status

200.description: List of members with meter points

post.description: Creates a new member in the given EEG. Field name1 is required. business_role defaults to "privat". MitgliedsNr is auto-generated if not provided.

get.description: Returns a single member with all their assigned meter points.

put.description: Updates an existing member's details. Provided fields overwrite existing values; omitting a field typically retains the current value (except nullable fields which are cleared).

delete.description: Permanently removes a member and their data from the EEG. This action is irreversible.

post.description: Sets the member to INACTIVE, stores the Austrittsdatum, and triggers CM_REV_SP for all active meter points (abgemeldet_am IS NULL).
Adds a new meter point (Zählpunkt) to a member. zaehlpunkt and energierichtung are required. verteilungsmodell defaults to DYNAMIC; status defaults to ACTIVATED.

parameters.description: Meter point data (zaehlpunkt and energierichtung required)
parameters.name: mp

get.description: Generates a SEPA mandate PDF containing the member's name, address, IBAN, mandate reference, creditor ID, acceptance timestamp, IP address, and the contract text accepted during onboarding.
get.summary: Download SEPA mandate PDF for a member

get.description: Returns a single meter point by its UUID.

put.description: Updates an existing meter point's attributes. Provided non-empty fields overwrite existing values. generation_type is cleared when sent as an empty string.

delete.description: Permanently removes a meter point. This action is irreversible.

get.description: Returns all onboarding requests (pending, approved, rejected, converted) for the given EEG.
get.summary: List onboarding requests for an EEG

get.description: Returns a single onboarding request by its UUID, scoped to the given EEG.

patch.description: Updates the status of an onboarding request. When status is 'approved', atomically creates the member, meter points, and EDA Anmeldung processes, then marks the request as 'converted'. When status is 'rejected', records the rejection with optional admin notes.
patch.summary: Approve or reject an onboarding request

get.description: Returns all Mehrfachteilnahme records (meter point participations) for the given EEG.

post.description: Creates a new Mehrfachteilnahme record linking a meter point to the EEG with a given participation factor, share type (GC/RC_R/RC_L/CC), and validity period.

put.description: Updates an existing Mehrfachteilnahme record. All writable fields are replaced.

get.description: Gibt für jedes Kalendertag des angegebenen Jahres an, ob Messwerte für die EEG vorhanden sind. Nützlich für die Darstellung der Datenverfügbarkeit vor einem Import.
Generates an XLSX annual report with two sheets: member list at the reference date and per-member energy + billing totals for the date range.

parameters.description: Member reference date (YYYY-MM-DD) — members active on this date are listed
parameters.name: date

parameters.description: Period start (YYYY-MM-DD) for energy and billing
parameters.name: from

parameters.description: Period end (YYYY-MM-DD, inclusive) for energy and billing
parameters.name: to

get.description: Returns aggregated energy and financial data grouped by calendar month for the given year. Each row contains consumption/generation kWh and revenue/payout totals.
Returns aggregated invoice totals and energy volumes per member over an optional date range. Used for the members breakdown report.

post.description: Restores all EEG data from a previously exported JSON backup file. The operation runs inside a single database transaction: existing data for the EEG is deleted in FK-safe order, then all records from the backup are re-inserted. The backup file must be uploaded as multipart/form-data with field name 'file'. Only backup version '1' is supported.
post.summary: Restore EEG data from a backup snapshot

parameters.description: JSON backup file (produced by the Export endpoint)
parameters.name: file

get.description: Full-text search across members (name, email, member number), meter points (Zählpunktnummer), and invoices (invoice number). The query string must be at least 2 characters long. Returns empty arrays for each category when no matches are found.
get.summary: Search members, meter points and invoices

post.description: Importiert eine CAMT.054 Bankbenachrichtigung und erfasst automatisch Rücklastschriften für die betroffenen Rechnungen.

get.description: Generates and returns a pain.001.001.03 SEPA credit-transfer XML for the invoices of the given EEG. Optionally filtered by billing_run_id or legacy period_start/period_end query params. Only invoices with status draft, pending, or sent are included.

Generates and returns a pain.008.001.02 SEPA direct-debit XML for the invoices of the given EEG. Optionally filtered by billing_run_id or legacy period_start/period_end query params. Only invoices with status draft, pending, or sent are included.
Returns aggregate statistics for the EEG such as member counts, meter point counts, and energy totals.
Gibt alle Tarifpläne (TariffSchedules) einer EEG zurück.

post.description: Legt einen neuen Tarifplan für eine EEG an. Granularität: annual, monthly, daily, quarter_hour (Standard: monthly).

400.description: Ungültige EEG ID oder fehlender Name

get.description: Gibt einen einzelnen Tarifplan inklusive aller Tarifeinträge zurück.

put.description: Aktualisiert Name und Granularität eines bestehenden Tarifplans.

delete.description: Löscht einen Tarifplan und alle zugehörigen Tarifeinträge endgültig.

post.description: Aktiviert einen Tarifplan für die EEG. Pro EEG kann nur ein Tarifplan gleichzeitig aktiv sein. Gibt 409 zurück, wenn bereits ein anderer aktiv ist.

409.description: Ein anderer Tarifplan ist bereits aktiv

delete.description: Deaktiviert den aktiven Tarifplan, ohne ihn zu löschen.

put.description: Ersetzt alle Tarifeinträge eines Tarifplans vollständig durch die übergebene Liste. Jeder Eintrag enthält einen Gültigkeitszeitraum sowie Energie- und Einspeisepreis in ct/kWh.

get.description: Returns limited EEG details for display on the public onboarding page (name, billing period, contract text).

post.description: Creates a new onboarding request (pending status). Sends a magic-token status link to the applicant and notifies EEG administrators. Always requires contract_accepted=true and at least one meter point.
Creates a short-lived (30 min) email-verification token and sends a confirmation link to the applicant. Always returns HTTP 200 to avoid email enumeration.
Validates the email-verification token and marks it as verified. Returns the verified email address and name fields on success. Returns 400 if the token is invalid or expired.
Looks up a pending onboarding request by email + EEG ID, issues a fresh magic token, and resends the status link email. Always returns HTTP 200 to avoid email enumeration.

get.description: Returns the onboarding request corresponding to the given magic token. Returns 410 Gone if the token has expired.
get.summary: Get onboarding request status by magic token

post.description: Exchanges a one-time magic link token (from the login email) for a long-lived session token. The session token must be passed as X-Portal-Session header on subsequent portal requests.
post.summary: Exchange magic link token for a portal session

get.description: Returns all invoices for the authenticated member. Requires a valid X-Portal-Session header.
Streams the PDF file for the given invoice. The invoice must belong to the member identified by the X-Portal-Session header. Returns 404 if the PDF has not yet been generated.
Returns the member record and associated EEG details for the portal session identified by the X-Portal-Session header.
get.summary: Get authenticated member's profile and EEG info

post.description: Looks up the member by email (and optionally eeg_id) and sends a magic login link by email. If the email is associated with multiple EEGs and no eeg_id is given, returns a list of EEG choices for the user to select. Always returns HTTP 200 to avoid email enumeration.
post.summary: Request a magic login link for the member portal

parameters.description: Member email and optional EEG ID
parameters.name: body

process.description: EDA process code, e.g. EC_EINZEL_ANM, DATEN_CRMSG

member_name.description: Joined field — only populated by ListByEEG, empty in other queries.

share_type.description: GC, RC_R, RC_L, CC, NONE, MULTI

status.description: pending, sent, first_confirmed, confirmed, completed, rejected, error

auto_billing_enabled.description: Auto-billing: create draft billing run automatically on a fixed day each month/quarter

eda_imap_host.description:
Per-EEG EDA credentials (IMAP polling + SMTP send to edanet.at).
Passwords are stored encrypted in the DB; the repository decrypts them.
Returned as "***" via API if set; send empty or "***" to keep existing.

eda_marktpartner_id.description: own EC/GC/RC number for outbound messages

eda_netzbetreiber_id.description: Netzbetreiber ECNumber to send messages to

free_kwh.description: complimentary kWh per member per period

gap_alert_enabled.description: Gap alert: notify when meter points have no readings for N days

gruendungsdatum.description: Founding date — coverage tool will not flag days before this as missing

iban.description: SEPA banking details for payment file generation

invoice_number_start.description: first invoice number for this EEG

is_demo.description: IsDemo marks this EEG as a demo — emails and EDA messages are suppressed

logo_path.description: Company logo path (stored as absolute filesystem path)

meter_fee_eur.description: fixed fee per consumer meter point per period

onboarding_contract_text.description: Onboarding contract text shown to applicants (may include {iban} and {datum} placeholders)

participation_fee_eur.description: fixed member participation fee per period

portal_show_full_energy.description: Portal: whether to show full energy data (total consumption/generation) in the member portal

sepa_pre_notification_days.description:
SepaPreNotificationDays is the minimum days between invoice date and SEPA collection.
SEPA Rulebook mandates ≥14 days. Configurable per EEG. Default: 14.

smtp_host.description: Per-EEG invoice SMTP credentials (Rechnungsversand via resend / own SMTP).

strasse.description: Rechnungssteller (§11 UStG) — EEG address shown on invoices

uid_nummer.description: EEG VAT ID (optional, not all EEGs are VAT-registered)

quality.description: L0 (total), L1 (measured), L2 (substitute), L3 (faulty — excluded from billing)

consumption_net_amount.description: Split net amounts — stored separately to enable per-account EA import bookings

consumption_vat_pct.description: Split VAT — consumption uses EEG-level rate, generation uses member-specific rate

storno_pdf_path.description: set when invoice is formally cancelled (storno document)

total_amount.description: gross saldo incl. VAT (may be negative for producers)

business_role.description:
BusinessRole classifies the member for VAT purposes on credit notes.
Valid values: "privat", "kleinunternehmer", "landwirt_pauschaliert",
"unternehmen", "gemeinde_bga", "gemeinde_hoheitlich"

sepa_mandate_signed_at.description: SEPA mandate data captured during onboarding (used for mandate PDF)

status.description: Status tracks the member's lifecycle: ACTIVE | REGISTERED | NEW | INACTIVE

uid_nummer.description:
UidNummer is the member's VAT ID (UID).
When set, the member is treated as VAT-liable → Reverse Charge on credit notes.

use_vat.description:
UseVat / VatPct: reserved for future manual override on credit notes.
NOT applied to consumer invoices (those use only the EEG's settings).

consent_id.description: NB-assigned ConsentId from ZUSTIMMUNG_ECON; required for CM_REV_SP

generation_type.description: PV | Windkraft | Wasserkraft; only for GENERATION meters

payouts.description: absolute sum of negative invoice totals (producer credits)

revenue.description: sum of positive invoice totals (consumer charges incl. VAT)

generation_type.description: PV | Windkraft | Wasserkraft | Biomasse | Sonstige — only for GENERATION

eda_imap_host.description: Per-EEG EDA credentials (IMAP + SMTP for MaKo)

uid_nummer.description: UidNummer: VAT ID of the member. When set → Reverse Charge on credit notes.

use_vat.description:
UseVat / VatPct: reserved for manual override on credit notes.
NOT applied to consumer invoices.

password.description: optional — omit to keep existing password

consent_end.description: YYYY-MM-DD; min today, max +30 Austrian working days

consent_id.description: NB-assigned ConsentId from ZUSTIMMUNG_ECON; required for CM_REV_SP

generation_type.description: PV | Windkraft | Wasserkraft; only for GENERATION meters
